description:
Cyber Security Specialist - Security Architecture & Design

Our client is seeking an experienced Cyber Security Specialist with a strong focus on security architecture, design, and engineering to help protect and enable critical internal programs across cloud and on-prem environments. This is a hands-on role where your expertise will directly influence how security is embedded across systems-not bolted on after the fact.

You shall work closely with stakeholders, architects, and delivery teams to design secure solutions, uplift security maturity, and strengthen cyber resilience across the organisation.

Your Role
Partnering with internal stakeholders to understand program objectives, risks, and security requirements
Designing and configuring secure cloud and on-prem components aligned to recognised security baselines and best practice
Implementing and maintaining security controls to protect systems from evolving cyber threats
Conducting security assessments and reviews to identify vulnerabilities and recommend pragmatic remediation actions
Supporting the development of monitoring processes for security logs and alerts to enable timely detection and response
Collaborating with security team members to develop and uplift security policies, standards, and procedures
Providing practical security guidance to development and delivery teams to ensure secure-by-design outcomes
Staying across emerging threats, technologies, and approaches to continuously improve security posture
Producing clear, well-structured documentation for security configurations, processes, and procedures
What you will bring

Essential experience

5+ years' experience in cyber security, with a strong focus on security architecture or engineering
At least 2 years' experience in one or more of the following:


Configuring cloud components in line with recognised security baselines
Applying security frameworks and standards (e.g. NIST, ISO, CIS, ISM, SACSF)
Conducting security assessments and validating penetration testing outcomes
Designing security architectures and translating business requirements into secure technical solutions
Strong technical foundations and a clear commitment to continuous learning
Excellent communication skills, with the ability to explain security concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a practical, risk-based mindset
Ability to work autonomously while collaborating effectively in a fast-paced environment

Highly regarded

Knowledge and application of SA CSF, Essential Eight, and ISM
Hands-on experience with security tooling such as IAM, EDR, SIEM, and firewalls
Experience with secure configuration, testing, and operational troubleshooting

To be considered for the role click the 'apply' button or for more information about this and other opportunities please contact Jennifer James on 08 7422 0614 or email: jjames@paxus.com.au and quote the above job reference number.

Paxus values diversity and welcomes applications from Indigenous Australians, people from diverse cultural and linguistic backgrounds and people living with a disability. If you require an adjustment to the recruitment process, including the application form in an alternate format, please contact me on the above contact details.
